name: Inapa - Investimentos, Participacoes e Gestao, S.A.
summary: Inapa - Investimentos, Participa√É¬ß√É¬µes e Gest√É¬£o, S.A., through its subsidiaries, distributes and sells paper products in Portugal and internationally. It operates through three segments: Paper Supply, Packaging, and Visual Communication. The company offers coated, uncoated, carbonless, self-adhesive, board, envelope, and fine papers; graphics consumables, such as inks, cleaning products, additives printing blankets, and plates and varnishes; office papers; and office supplies. It also provides boxes, films, tapes, fillers, bags, labels, fillings, and equipment, as well as personalized packaging solutions; and a range of printing products and services for large format digital printing, including printers, inks/toners, media, software, and technical assistance, as well as offers logistic services. The company was founded in 1965 and is headquartered in Lisbon, Portugal.
